sentence_reviews.text: Knowledge-graph systems organize entities and relations for semantic search, integration, multi-hop retrieval, probabilistic inference, and grounded generation.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Packet candidate references and dependency rationale.
sentence_reviews.notes: Knowledge graph, RAG, probabilistic graphical model, GNN, and transformer references collectively support entities/relations, retrieval, inference, and grounded generation.

sentence_reviews.text: They preserve explicit structure and lineage that can be difficult to recover from embeddings or parameters alone.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Packet candidate references and dependency rationale.
sentence_reviews.notes: Graph and probabilistic-model references support explicit relational structure; the contrast with embeddings or parameters is defensible synthesis.

sentence_reviews.text: Ontology design, entity resolution, freshness, relation confidence, and graph construction cost dominate quality.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Packet candidate references and dependency rationale.
sentence_reviews.notes: AIMA, Koller, PML, RAG, and graph references support ontology, entity/relation quality, uncertainty, freshness, and construction-quality concerns in synthesis.

sentence_reviews.text: Knowledge graphs, semantic search & relational reasoning integrates Knowledge graphs, ontologies & schemas as part of an end-to-end application boundary.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Packet candidate references and dependency rationale.
sentence_reviews.notes: Knowledge graph systems directly depend on graph/ontology/schema representations.

sentence_reviews.text: Knowledge graphs, semantic search & relational reasoning integrates Graph RAG & structured retrieval as part of an end-to-end application boundary.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Packet candidate references and dependency rationale.
sentence_reviews.notes: Semantic search, multi-hop retrieval, and grounded generation support Graph RAG as common.

sentence_reviews.text: Knowledge graphs, semantic search & relational reasoning integrates Bayesian networks, MRFs & factor graphs as part of an end-to-end application boundary.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Packet candidate references and dependency rationale.
sentence_reviews.notes: Probabilistic inference over relations supports Bayesian/factor graph dependency.

sentence_reviews.text: Knowledge graphs, semantic search & relational reasoning integrates Provenance, citations & evidence tracking as part of an end-to-end application boundary.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Packet candidate references and dependency rationale.
sentence_reviews.notes: Lineage and grounded generation support provenance/citation tracking.

sentence_reviews.text: Knowledge graphs, semantic search & relational reasoning integrates Expert systems, production rules & rule engines as part of an end-to-end application boundary.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Packet candidate references and dependency rationale.
sentence_reviews.notes: Rule systems are a plausible optional layer over explicit knowledge graphs.
